name: emberdb
description: TypeScript client for ember — a high-performance gRPC cache

scripts.proto-gen: npx --yes --package=@grpc/proto-loader proto-loader-gen-types --proto_path=../../proto --outDir=src/generated ../../proto/ember/v1/ember.proto && mkdir -p proto/ember/v1 && cp ../../proto/ember/v1/ember.proto proto/ember/v1/ember.proto
